# Daily Highlights

Write 2-5 business-language bullets under today's date heading.
The daily status report workflow picks these up automatically.
Format: `## YYYY-MM-DD` followed by bullet lines starting with `- `.

---

## 2026-03-16
- SMS seasonal reminder system: owners with properties in 8 US vacation destinations will receive timed SMS alerts (12 weeks, 6 weeks, and 2 weeks before peak events) encouraging them to list their properties for rent
- Notification Center: unified system for managing in-app, email, and SMS notifications with a catalog of 18 notification types and per-user channel preferences
- Owner notification preferences page with TCPA-compliant SMS opt-in (legally required consent flow before any text messages can be sent)
- Admin notification dashboard: seasonal event calendar for 48 events across Orlando, Miami, Las Vegas, Hawaii, Myrtle Beach, Colorado, New York, and Nashville — with manual send controls and delivery tracking
- SMS is currently running in test mode (messages logged but not sent) — real SMS delivery will activate once the company is registered and carrier approval is obtained
